name: yotpo
description: Reads Yotpo store products, product variants, collections, customers, orders, and webhook targets/filters/subscriptions, and writes product/variant/order/customer/fulfillment/collection-membership/webhook mutations through the Yotpo Core API v3.

risk.read: external Yotpo Core API read of product, variant, collection, customer, order, and webhook configuration data
risk.write: external mutation: creates/updates products, variants, orders, customers, order fulfillments, and collections; manages collection membership and webhook target/filter/subscription lifecycle
risk.approval: required for all write actions; reads require none
